framework.name: Agent Cards for Service Discovery
framework.description: Digital identity mechanism where each AI agent publishes a JSON file (agent card) over HTTP describing its capabilities, identity, and communication endpoints. Enables dynamic discovery of agents in a multi-agent system, analogous to business cards for AIs.
framework.raw_quote: Agent cards. Every AI agent has a digital business card. A JSON file served over HTTP. This card says, 'Here's who I am, what I can do, and how to reach me.'
